title: acantholimon androsaceum
intro: Acantholimon androsaceum, also known as Androsace, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Primulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Acantholimon androsaceum include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
